title: Commercial City Double Exposure Poster AI
sourceTitle: Commercial City Double Exposure Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Commercial city double-exposure poster featuring handsome adult male urban athlete in profile, short curly hair, beige shirt blended with New York. Subject: handsome adult male urban athlete in profile, short curly hair, beige shirt appears as the confident foreground profile portrait looking to the right, with Manhattan skyline, Brooklyn Bridge, yellow taxis, harbor, art deco towers blended into the face, shirt, and background through cinematic double exposure. Scene: New York becomes a luxurious aspirational cityscape with iconic architecture, waterfront or road energy, warm sunset atmosphere, and professional advertising polish. Composition: Fixed vertical commercial poster: large profile portrait in the foreground, city landmarks integrated through double exposure behind and inside the subject, warm lens flare, epic skyline depth, and bold bottom typography reading NEW YORK / BUILT FOR THE RUSH. Signature Elements: handsome adult male urban athlete in profile, short curly hair, beige shirt, New York, Manhattan skyline, Brooklyn Bridge, yellow taxis, harbor, art deco towers, NEW YORK / BUILT FOR THE RUSH, profile portrait, double exposure skyline, golden sunset, luxury city atmosphere, and professional campaign finish. Style: Photorealistic commercial advertising photography, cinematic double exposure, sports-magazine or luxury city campaign energy, professional color grading, epic aspirational finish, and 8K detail. Color Palette: Warm golden-hour sunset tones, beige and amber portrait highlights, city-specific accent colors, desert or skyline gold, soft blue shadows, and luxurious contrast. Lighting: Golden hour sunset light, cinematic lens flare, warm rim light on the profile, atmospheric skyline glow, and polished advertising contrast. Camera: Confident profile portrait camera combined with wide cityscape exposure, professional poster framing, and clear right-facing gaze. Typography: NEW YORK / BUILT FOR THE RUSH appears as the big bold bottom poster text, readable and integrated with the advertising layout. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
